title: Feature support language from Righ to Left (Hebrew)
excerpt: When I send an Email in Hebrew using a Emails & notification or any other way . The sentences in the email are received from left to right and not as it should be in the Hebrew language from right to left. It is Very Ver…

posts.author: Sarigw (Sarig Wohlstein)
posts.cookedHtml: When I send an Email in Hebrew using a Emails & notification or any other way . The sentences in the email are received from left to right and not as it should be in the Hebrew language from right to left. It is Very Very important so we can use Monday in our the organization.

posts.author: maria.zapolski (Maria Zapolski)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Sarig. Same issue for us, but support department answered me that there is no solution for the moment
